cards.name: Clock
cards.description: Shows the current time in large text with a weather icon and temperature pulled from weather.gov.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Countdown
cards.description: Generic countdown to any event. Set an event name and date — shows days remaining with a large number display.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Disney Countdown
cards.description: Countdown to your Disney trip. Shows days remaining in large text with a DISNEY header.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Weather Forecast
cards.description: 4-day weather forecast showing day, weather icon, high and low temperatures. Pulls from weather.gov — no API key required.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Stock Ticker
cards.description: Live stock or crypto price with dollar and percent change. Supports any Yahoo Finance symbol — AAPL, TSLA, BTC-USD, ^SPX, and more.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Market Indexes
cards.description: Shows up to three market indexes with current value and daily percent change.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Crypto Watch
cards.description: Shows up to three crypto symbols with current price and daily percent change.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Gas Price Local
cards.description: Uses a ZIP code to find the closest AAA metro gas average, with a state average fallback when no local metro match is available.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Portfolio Pulse
cards.description: Shows estimated portfolio value and daily gain or loss from configured ticker quantities.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Google Calendar
cards.description: Shows the next upcoming event from a public or private Google Calendar ICS URL. Includes event title, date or time, and relative countdown.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Hubitat Device
cards.description: Shows a live Hubitat Maker API device attribute such as temperature, humidity, switch, motion, contact, presence, lock, power, or battery.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Hubitat Multi
cards.description: Shows one attribute from several Hubitat Maker API devices in a compact list.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Hubitat Safety
cards.description: Checks several Hubitat devices and shows All Secure when every device has the expected safe value. Lists devices that need attention.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Water Leak Alert
cards.description: Checks several Hubitat water sensors. If every sensor is dry, the card skips itself; if any are wet, it shows an alert.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Pac-Man Chase
cards.description: Animated pixel card showing Pac-Man chasing ghosts across a tiny maze. Includes options for speed and dots.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Matrix Rain
cards.description: Animated falling green code columns for an ambient pixel display.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Pong Loop
cards.description: Animated retro paddle-and-ball loop with a tiny scoreboard.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Lava Lamp
cards.description: Animated colorful blobs drifting around like a tiny lava lamp.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Alien March
cards.description: Animated rows of tiny aliens marching across the display.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Snake
cards.description: Animated snake loop with a moving food dot.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Pixel Aquarium
cards.description: Animated little fish, bubbles, and plants for an ambient aquarium card.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Fireplace
cards.description: Animated pixel fireplace with flickering flames.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Tiny Traffic
cards.description: Animated tiny cars driving under a changing traffic light.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Fortune Cookie
cards.description: Shows a tiny daily fortune with a pixel fortune cookie.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: 8-Bit Heartbeat
cards.description: Animated pulsing pixel heart with a little heartbeat line.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Pixel Globe
cards.description: Animated tiny rotating globe with stars.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Moon Phase
cards.description: Shows the current moon phase and approximate lunar age.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Weather Mood
cards.description: Animated ambient weather scene based on ZIP code: sun, clouds, rain, or snow.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Weather Alert
cards.description: Shows active National Weather Service alerts for a ZIP code with a small radar-style icon. Skips itself when there are no active alerts.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Countdown Confetti
cards.description: Countdown card with animated confetti for trips, birthdays, launches, and other events.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: MLB Scores
cards.description: Live MLB scores with team logos, abbreviations, records, and game status from ESPN.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: NBA Scores
cards.description: Live NBA scores with team logos, abbreviations, records, and game status from ESPN.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: NHL Scores
cards.description: Live NHL scores with team logos, abbreviations, records, and game status from ESPN.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: NFL Scores
cards.description: Live NFL scores with team logos, abbreviations, records, and game status from ESPN.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Airport Delays
cards.description: Shows FAA airport delay status for one or more airport codes using the FAA NAS status feed.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Commute Time
cards.description: Shows an estimated drive time and distance between two addresses or latitude/longitude points using OpenStreetMap geocoding and OSRM routing.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Flights Overhead
cards.description: Shows the closest airborne flight overhead using OpenSky Network. Displays flight number, airline, altitude, speed, and distance. Free with optional OpenSky account for higher rate limits.
cards.author: bptworld

cards.name: Flight Tracker
cards.description: Track a specific flight using the Flightradar24 API. Shows route, live status, ETA, speed, altitude, and airline graphics when available. Optional origin and destination help match duplicate flight numbers. API calls are cached for five minutes.
cards.author: bptworld
